response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong full-stack and systems breadth, but the resume shows no modern C++ or Rust experience in the last decade and no geospatial routing or navigation pipeline work. The closest adjacencies are low-latency DLang services at Sociomantic and the GISCollective geo-data platform, which suggest aptitude for the domain but not direct fit. Worth a screening call only if the team is open to ramp-up on C++/Rust; otherwise a pass.
strengths: Low-latency distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (async I/O, fibers, high-throughput services)
Geospatial domain exposure through founding and operating GISCollective
Long track record of senior/staff IC roles with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship discipline
concerns: No demonstrated modern C++ or Rust production experience; C/C++ work was a brief 2014-2015 stint at NI
No navigation, routing, or map-tiling pipeline experience
Recent roles are TypeScript/Node-centric, far from the systems-programming core of this job
